title: "Glossary"
phase: generated
audience: public
status: current
owner: generated
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
bibliography: ../references.bib
number-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/glossary_build.py; edit docs/typst/shared/glossary.typ. -->

::: {.glossary-page}

::: {.glossary-intro}
**56 terms** across **10 categories**. The canonical source is
`docs/typst/shared/glossary.typ`; generated Quarto, Typst, YAML, KG, and shortcode artifacts
share the same definitions.

Tier counts: **27 core**, **13 support**,
and **16 background** terms. Core terms are the thesis math lookup;
background terms remain linkable but are visually demoted.

Use `{{{< gls term-id >}}}` for the linked short label and
`{{{< glsfull term-id >}}}` for the linked full label in QMD pages.
:::

<nav class="glossary-category-index" aria-label="Glossary categories">
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-tier-core">Core <span>27</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-core-math-lookup">Math lookup</a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-dataset">Dataset <span>11</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-geometry">Geometry <span>5</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-metrics">Metrics <span>3</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-model">Model <span>3</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-planning">Planning <span>1</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-reconstruction">Reconstruction <span>4</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-representation">Representation <span>2</span></a>
</nav>

## Core Math Lookup {#glossary-core-math-lookup}

<div class="glossary-lookup-wrap">
<table class="glossary-lookup-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Concept</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
<th>Symbols</th>
<th>Equations</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-next-best-view">NBV - Next-Best-View</a></td>
<td>Problem of selecting the next sensor viewpoint to improve an active reconstruction or inspection objective under a limited acquisition budget.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}$</span><code>rl.mdp_nbv</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}=(\mathcal{S},\mathcal{A},T,r_e,\gamma,H)$</span><code>rl.nbv_mdp</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI - Relative Reconstruction Improvement</a></td>
<td>Metric quantifying the relative reconstruction-quality improvement obtained by adding a candidate observation to the current reconstruction.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}$</span><code>oracle.rri</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t\cup\mathcal{P}_q,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}$</span><code>rri.rri</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-chamfer-distance">CD - Chamfer Distance</a></td>
<td>Historical bidirectional distance family used to compare reconstructed points against reference geometry.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$D$</span><code>rri.cd_value</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$D(\mathcal{P},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})=D_{P\to M}(\mathcal{P},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+D_{M\to P}(\mathcal{P},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})$</span><code>rri.cd</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI - Target-Specific RRI</a></td>
<td>RRI computed only on the ground-truth and reconstructed geometry associated with a selected target of interest.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}_e$</span><code>entity.rri_e</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}_e(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t^e\cup\mathcal{P}_q^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}$</span><code>rri.target_rri</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-target-of-interest">target - Target of Interest</a></td>
<td>Selected entity, object crop, point, region, or surface-deficit hypothesis whose reconstruction quality should be improved.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$e_t$</span><code>rl.target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-point-cloud">PC - Point Cloud</a></td>
<td>Set of 3D points representing observed scene geometry.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}_q$</span><code>oracle.points_q</code></span></div></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-candidate-view">candidate - Candidate View</a></td>
<td>Proposed camera pose whose expected reconstruction utility is evaluated before selecting the next observation.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t$</span><code>oracle.candidates_t</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$q_{t,i}$</span><code>oracle.candidate_qti</code></span></div></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI - Oracle RRI</a></td>
<td>RRI label computed with privileged ground-truth geometry, used for supervised training and evaluation.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}$</span><code>oracle.rri</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t\cup\mathcal{P}_q,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}$</span><code>rri.rri</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer - Target-Conditioned Scorer</a></td>
<td>VIN-style candidate scorer that receives scene state, a candidate view, and an encoding of the target of interest.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\hat{r}$</span><code>vin.rri_hat</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\rho=\operatorname{corr}(\operatorname{rank}(\hat{r}_i),\operatorname{rank}(r_i))$</span><code>metrics.spearman</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{TopKAcc}(k)=\frac{1}{N}\sum_i\mathbb{1}[y_i\in\mathrm{TopK}(\boldsymbol{\pi}_i,k)]$</span><code>metrics.topk_acc</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-observed-target-selection">OBS-SEL - Observed Target Selection</a></td>
<td>Main thesis protocol component requiring target selection to use only actor-visible observed or predicted target evidence.</td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-predicted-target-q">PRED-Q - Predicted-Target Q</a></td>
<td>Main thesis protocol component requiring scorer or Q_H inputs to use predicted or observed target descriptors.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$Q_H$</span><code>rl.qh</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$Q_H(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},a_t)=\mathbb{E}\left[G_t^{(H)}\mid s_t=s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},a_t\right]$</span><code>rl.q_h</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-ground-truth-target-evaluation">GT-EVAL - Ground-Truth Target Evaluation</a></td>
<td>Main thesis protocol component using ground-truth OBBs and target mesh crops only for labels and evaluation.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-acquisition-cost">cost - Acquisition Cost</a></td>
<td>Budget consumed to acquire observations, measured by view count, path length, elapsed time, invalid-action rate, or a weighted combination.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$C(\tau)$</span><code>rl.acquisition_cost</code></span></div></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-target-conditioned-nbv-mdp">NBV MDP - Target-Conditioned NBV MDP</a></td>
<td>Finite-horizon MDP contract for target-conditioned ARIA-NBV rollouts and fitted Q_H training.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}$</span><code>rl.mdp_nbv</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s$</span><code>rl.s</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{A}(s_t)$</span><code>rl.action_set</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$T$</span><code>rl.transition</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$r_t^e$</span><code>rl.reward_target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\gamma$</span><code>rl.gamma</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$H$</span><code>rl.H</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}=(\mathcal{S},\mathcal{A},T,r_e,\gamma,H)$</span><code>rl.nbv_mdp</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-rollout-state">state - Rollout State</a></td>
<td>Rollout state family separating actor-visible state from oracle-only supervision.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s$</span><code>rl.s</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{oracle}}$</span><code>rl.s_oracle</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t$</span><code>oracle.candidates_t</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$m_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.validity_mask</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\rho_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.invalid_reason</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$e_t$</span><code>rl.target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$b_t$</span><code>rl.budget</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}=(I_{1:t},T_{1:t},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{semi}},V^{\mathrm{root}},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}=(\mathrm{VinSnippetView},\mathcal{Q}_t,N_t,m_{t,i},\ell_{t,i})$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}=(V^{\mathrm{root}},\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{Q}_t,m_{t,i},\rho_{t,i},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},D_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},N_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}})$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{oracle}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}},\{D_{t,i}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathcal{P}_{t,i}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathrm{RRI}_{t,i}\}_{i=1}^{N_t})$</span><code>rl.s_oracle</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-historic-snippet-state">historic state - Historic Snippet State</a></td>
<td>Raw actor-visible state from the logged ASE/Project Aria snippet trajectory.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}=(I_{1:t},T_{1:t},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{semi}},V^{\mathrm{root}},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-persisted-offline-state">offline state - Persisted Offline Sample State</a></td>
<td>Compact persisted state used by VIN training and offline diagnostics.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}=(\mathrm{VinSnippetView},\mathcal{Q}_t,N_t,m_{t,i},\ell_{t,i})$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-minimal-counterfactual-state">CF0 state - Minimal Counterfactual Actor State</a></td>
<td>Main Q_H actor state for mesh-supervised counterfactual rollouts.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}=(V^{\mathrm{root}},\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{Q}_t,m_{t,i},\rho_{t,i},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-geometry-rich-counterfactual-state">CF+ state - Geometry-Rich Counterfactual State</a></td>
<td>Counterfactual ablation state with selected synthetic geometry observations.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},D_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},N_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}})$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-oracle-rollout-state">oracle state - Oracle Rollout State</a></td>
<td>Privileged rollout state for labels, upper bounds, and evaluation.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{oracle}}$</span><code>rl.s_oracle</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{oracle}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}},\{D_{t,i}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathcal{P}_{t,i}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathrm{RRI}_{t,i}\}_{i=1}^{N_t})$</span><code>rl.s_oracle</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-finite-candidate-action-set">action set - Finite Candidate Action Set</a></td>
<td>Masked finite action-index set over sampled candidate views.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{A}(s_t)$</span><code>rl.action_set</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$q_{t,i}$</span><code>oracle.candidate_qti</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t$</span><code>oracle.candidates_t</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$m_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.validity_mask</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t=\{q_{t,i}\}_{i=1}^{N_t},\quad \mathcal{A}(s_t)=\{i\in\{1,\ldots,N_t\}:m_{t,i}=1\},\quad q_t=q_{t,a_t}$</span><code>rl.finite_action_set</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-counterfactual-transition">transition - Counterfactual Transition</a></td>
<td>Replayable state update after selecting a candidate index.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$T$</span><code>rl.transition</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}_q$</span><code>oracle.points_q</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}_{t+1}=\mathcal{P}_t\cup\mathcal{P}_{q_t}$</span><code>rl.counterfactual_transition</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-target-rri-reward">reward - Target-RRI Reward</a></td>
<td>Quality-only immediate reward equal to target-specific RRI for the selected candidate.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$r_t^e$</span><code>rl.reward_target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}_e$</span><code>entity.rri_e</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$r_t^e=\mathrm{RRI}_e(q_t\mid \mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})$</span><code>rl.target_rri_reward</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-finite-horizon-return">return - Finite-Horizon Return</a></td>
<td>H-step discounted return over target-RRI rewards.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$G_t^{(H)}$</span><code>rl.return_h</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$r_t^e$</span><code>rl.reward_target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\gamma$</span><code>rl.gamma</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$H$</span><code>rl.H</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$G_t^{(H)}=\sum_{k=0}^{H-1}\gamma^k r_{t+k}^e$</span><code>rl.finite_horizon_return</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-finite-horizon-q-function">Q_H - Finite-Horizon Q Function</a></td>
<td>Finite-horizon candidate-value function for target-conditioned ARIA-NBV.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$Q_H$</span><code>rl.qh</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$G_t^{(H)}$</span><code>rl.return_h</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$a$</span><code>rl.a</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$Q_H(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},a_t)=\mathbb{E}\left[G_t^{(H)}\mid s_t=s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},a_t\right]$</span><code>rl.q_h</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$y_t^Q=r_t+\gamma V(s_{t+1})$</span><code>rl.q_backup</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-validity-mask">mask - Validity Mask</a></td>
<td>Hard mask that separates feasible candidate actions from invalid candidates.</td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$m_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.validity_mask</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\rho_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.invalid_reason</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$m$</span><code>vin.cand_valid</code></span></div></td>
<td><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$m_i=\mathbb{1}[\mathrm{finite}]\mathbb{1}[v_i>0]\mathbb{1}[v_i^{\mathrm{sem}}>0]$</span><code>metrics.candidate_validity</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t=\{q_{t,i}\}_{i=1}^{N_t},\quad \mathcal{A}(s_t)=\{i\in\{1,\ldots,N_t\}:m_{t,i}=1\},\quad q_t=q_{t,a_t}$</span><code>rl.finite_action_set</code></span></div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#term-project-aria">Project Aria</a></td>
<td>Egocentric research-device and tooling ecosystem for calibrated, time-aligned multimodal sensing.</td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
<td><span class="glossary-muted">-</span></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

## Core Concepts {#glossary-tier-core}

<div class="glossary-card-grid glossary-card-grid-core">

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-next-best-view">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Next-Best-View</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">NBV</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.view_selection</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>next best view</code> <code>viewpoint selection</code> <code>view planning</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}$</span><code>rl.mdp_nbv</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}=(\mathcal{S},\mathcal{A},T,r_e,\gamma,H)$</span><code>rl.nbv_mdp</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Problem of selecting the next sensor viewpoint to improve an active reconstruction or inspection objective under a limited acquisition budget.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">In ARIA-NBV, the preferred objective is reconstruction quality improvement rather than coverage alone, with candidate views ranked by oracle or learned RRI scores.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/nbv_background.html" title="docs/contents/theory/nbv_background.qmd">NBV Background</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd">Master Thesis Roadmap</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#research-questions" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#research-questions">Master Thesis Research Questions</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-GenNBV-chen2024">&#64;GenNBV-chen2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Relative Reconstruction Improvement</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">RRI</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">metrics.reconstruction_quality</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>reconstruction-quality gain</code> <code>relative quality improvement</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}$</span><code>oracle.rri</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t\cup\mathcal{P}_q,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}$</span><code>rri.rri</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Metric quantifying the relative reconstruction-quality improvement obtained by adding a candidate observation to the current reconstruction.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV computes RRI by comparing reconstruction error before and after fusing candidate-view geometry, usually against an ASE ground-truth mesh for oracle supervision and evaluation.</p>

::: {.glossary-formula}
$$
\mathrm{RRI}(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t\cup\mathcal{P}_q,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}
$$
:::

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/rri_metrics.oracle_rri.html" title="docs/reference/rri_metrics.oracle_rri.qmd">oracle_rri</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/literature/vin_nbv.qmd">VIN-NBV</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-chamfer-distance">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Chamfer Distance</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">CD</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">metrics.reconstruction_quality</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>Chamfer metric</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$D$</span><code>rri.cd_value</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$D(\mathcal{P},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})=D_{P\to M}(\mathcal{P},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+D_{M\to P}(\mathcal{P},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})$</span><code>rri.cd</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Historical bidirectional distance family used to compare reconstructed points against reference geometry.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Thesis-facing ARIA-NBV notation uses point-mesh error D with directional components D_{P-&gt;M} and D_{M-&gt;P}; older seminar material may still call this CD.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-point-cloud">PC</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-ground-truth">GT</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/rri_metrics.metrics.html" title="docs/reference/rri_metrics.metrics.qmd">metrics</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-target-specific-rri">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target-Specific RRI</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">target RRI</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">metrics.reconstruction_quality</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>entity RRI</code> <code>object RRI</code> <code>target RRI</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}_e$</span><code>entity.rri_e</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}_e(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t^e\cup\mathcal{P}_q^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}$</span><code>rri.target_rri</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">RRI computed only on the ground-truth and reconstructed geometry associated with a selected target of interest.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Target-specific RRI lets the thesis compare views by how much they improve a selected object or region, even when scene-level RRI would prefer large background surfaces.</p>

::: {.glossary-formula}
$$
\mathrm{RRI}_e(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t^e\cup\mathcal{P}_q^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t^e,\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}
$$
:::

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-acquisition-cost">cost</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq1-objective" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq1-objective">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-target-of-interest">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target of Interest</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">target</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">entity.targeting</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>target entity</code> <code>object of interest</code> <code>inspection target</code> <code>task target</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$e_t$</span><code>rl.target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Selected entity, object crop, point, region, or surface-deficit hypothesis whose reconstruction quality should be improved.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Target-conditioned ARIA-NBV variants use this target as an explicit input to candidate scoring and planning instead of optimizing only scene-level RRI.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oriented-bounding-box">OBB</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq2-target-encoding" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq2-target-encoding">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/vin.types.html" title="docs/reference/vin.types.qmd">types</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-point-cloud">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Point Cloud</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">PC</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">reconstruction.representation</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>3D points</code> <code>semi-dense point cloud</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}_q$</span><code>oracle.points_q</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Set of 3D points representing observed scene geometry.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV compares current and candidate-fused point clouds against ground-truth meshes to compute oracle RRI and surface-distance diagnostics.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">SLAM</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/surface_metrics.html" title="docs/contents/theory/surface_metrics.qmd">Surface Reconstruction Metrics</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-candidate-view">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Candidate View</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">candidate</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.action</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>candidate pose</code> <code>candidate viewpoint</code> <code>next-view candidate</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t$</span><code>oracle.candidates_t</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$q_{t,i}$</span><code>oracle.candidate_qti</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Proposed camera pose whose expected reconstruction utility is evaluated before selecting the next observation.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV samples candidate views around a reference pose or target, renders candidate depths from the mesh for oracle labels, and scores candidates with RRI or learned VIN predictions.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-next-best-view">NBV</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq3-candidates" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq3-candidates">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.pose_generation.CandidateViewGenerator.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.pose_generation.CandidateViewGenerator.qmd">CandidateViewGenerator</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-oracle-rri">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Oracle RRI</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">oracle RRI</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">supervision.oracle</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>RRI oracle</code> <code>oracle label</code> <code>mesh-supervised RRI</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}$</span><code>oracle.rri</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{RRI}(q)=\frac{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})-D(\mathcal{P}_t\cup\mathcal{P}_q,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})}{D(\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}})+\varepsilon}$</span><code>rri.rri</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">RRI label computed with privileged ground-truth geometry, used for supervised training and evaluation.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The current oracle renders candidate depth maps from ASE ground-truth meshes, backprojects candidate point clouds, fuses them with the current semi-dense reconstruction, and scores the resulting surface-distance improvement.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-aria-synthetic-environments">ASE</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html#roadmap-m1" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd#roadmap-m1">Master Thesis Roadmap</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-target-conditioned-scorer">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target-Conditioned Scorer</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">target-conditioned scorer</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">model.scoring</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>target-conditioned VIN</code> <code>target-aware scorer</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\hat{r}$</span><code>vin.rri_hat</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\rho=\operatorname{corr}(\operatorname{rank}(\hat{r}_i),\operatorname{rank}(r_i))$</span><code>metrics.spearman</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathrm{TopKAcc}(k)=\frac{1}{N}\sum_i\mathbb{1}[y_i\in\mathrm{TopK}(\boldsymbol{\pi}_i,k)]$</span><code>metrics.topk_acc</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">VIN-style candidate scorer that receives scene state, a candidate view, and an encoding of the target of interest.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The scorer predicts target-specific utility so view ranking can prioritize a selected entity or region instead of only optimizing scene-level RRI.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-horizon-q-function">Q_H</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/vin.model_v3.html" title="docs/reference/vin.model_v3.qmd">model_v3</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.qmd">VinModelV3</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-observed-target-selection">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Observed Target Selection</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">OBS-SEL</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">protocol.targeting</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>observed-only target selection</code> <code>actor-visible target selection</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Main thesis protocol component requiring target selection to use only actor-visible observed or predicted target evidence.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Observed Target Selection uses predicted or tracked OBBs, class probabilities, confidence, projected area, and semidense or EVL support. Ground-truth target annotations are not visible to the selector in the main thesis protocol.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-predicted-target-q">PRED-Q</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-ground-truth-target-evaluation">GT-EVAL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oriented-bounding-box">OBB</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq2-target-encoding" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq2-target-encoding">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq-thesis-boundary" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq-thesis-boundary">Master Thesis Research Questions</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-predicted-target-q">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Predicted-Target Q</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">PRED-Q</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">protocol.learning</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>predicted-target scorer</code> <code>predicted-target Q_H</code> <code>actor-visible Q</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$Q_H$</span><code>rl.qh</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$Q_H(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},a_t)=\mathbb{E}\left[G_t^{(H)}\mid s_t=s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},a_t\right]$</span><code>rl.q_h</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Main thesis protocol component requiring scorer or Q_H inputs to use predicted or observed target descriptors.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Predicted-Target Q covers target-conditioned one-step scoring and finite-candidate Q_H selection whose target inputs are actor-visible predicted or observed descriptors, not ground-truth target annotations.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-observed-target-selection">OBS-SEL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-ground-truth-target-evaluation">GT-EVAL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-horizon-q-function">Q_H</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq2-target-encoding" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq2-target-encoding">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-DoubleDQN-vanHasselt2015">&#64;DoubleDQN-vanHasselt2015</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-ground-truth-target-evaluation">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Ground-Truth Target Evaluation</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">GT-EVAL</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">protocol.evaluation</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>GT target evaluation</code> <code>GT target crop evaluation</code> <code>oracle target evaluation</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}}$</span><code>ase.mesh_target</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Main thesis protocol component using ground-truth OBBs and target mesh crops only for labels and evaluation.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Ground-Truth Target Evaluation uses GT OBBs and target mesh crops for oracle target-RRI labels, matching checks, and evaluation while keeping those annotations hidden from the actor-visible selector, scorer, and Q_H model in the main result.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-ground-truth">GT</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-observed-target-selection">OBS-SEL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-predicted-target-q">PRED-Q</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq2-target-encoding" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq2-target-encoding">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq1-objective" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq1-objective">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-acquisition-cost">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Acquisition Cost</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">cost</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.objective</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>capture budget</code> <code>view budget</code> <code>motion cost</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$C(\tau)$</span><code>rl.acquisition_cost</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Budget consumed to acquire observations, measured by view count, path length, elapsed time, invalid-action rate, or a weighted combination.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The thesis should first report cumulative target RRI and acquisition cost separately, then use scalarized objectives only when the tradeoff is explicit.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-next-best-view">NBV</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq1-objective" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq1-objective">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html#roadmap-m5" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd#roadmap-m5">Master Thesis Roadmap</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-target-conditioned-nbv-mdp">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target-Conditioned NBV MDP</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">NBV MDP</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.mdp</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>ARIA-NBV MDP</code> <code>rollout MDP</code> <code>finite-candidate NBV MDP</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}$</span><code>rl.mdp_nbv</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s$</span><code>rl.s</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{A}(s_t)$</span><code>rl.action_set</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$T$</span><code>rl.transition</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$r_t^e$</span><code>rl.reward_target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\gamma$</span><code>rl.gamma</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$H$</span><code>rl.H</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}=(\mathcal{S},\mathcal{A},T,r_e,\gamma,H)$</span><code>rl.nbv_mdp</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Finite-horizon MDP contract for target-conditioned ARIA-NBV rollouts and fitted Q_H training.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The ARIA-NBV MDP keeps actions restricted to sampled finite candidate views and keeps GT meshes or GT target crops outside the actor-visible state. It is the contract that connects target-conditioned rollout generation, reward computation, validity masks, and fitted finite-horizon Q learning.</p>

::: {.glossary-formula}
**ARIA-NBV MDP contract**

$$
\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{NBV}}=(\mathcal{S},\mathcal{A},T,r_e,\gamma,H)
$$
:::

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-rollout-state">state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-candidate-action-set">action set</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-counterfactual-transition">transition</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-rri-reward">reward</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-horizon-return">return</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-horizon-q-function">Q_H</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-validity-mask">mask</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rl_planning.html#rl-planning-theory" title="docs/contents/theory/rl_planning.qmd#rl-planning-theory">Finite-Candidate Rollout And Q_H Contract</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html#roadmap-m5" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd#roadmap-m5">Master Thesis Roadmap</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-DoubleDQN-vanHasselt2015">&#64;DoubleDQN-vanHasselt2015</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-rollout-state">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Rollout State</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">state</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.mdp</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>MDP state</code> <code>actor-visible state</code> <code>rollout observation</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s$</span><code>rl.s</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{oracle}}$</span><code>rl.s_oracle</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{P}$</span><code>oracle.points</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\mathcal{Q}_t$</span><code>oracle.candidates_t</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$m_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.validity_mask</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$\rho_{t,i}$</span><code>rl.invalid_reason</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$e_t$</span><code>rl.target</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$b_t$</span><code>rl.budget</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}=(I_{1:t},T_{1:t},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{semi}},V^{\mathrm{root}},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}=(\mathrm{VinSnippetView},\mathcal{Q}_t,N_t,m_{t,i},\ell_{t,i})$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}=(V^{\mathrm{root}},\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{Q}_t,m_{t,i},\rho_{t,i},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},D_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},N_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}})$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span> <span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{oracle}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}},\mathcal{M}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathcal{M}_e^{\mathrm{GT}},\{D_{t,i}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathcal{P}_{t,i}^{\mathrm{GT}},\mathrm{RRI}_{t,i}\}_{i=1}^{N_t})$</span><code>rl.s_oracle</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Rollout state family separating actor-visible state from oracle-only supervision.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV distinguishes raw historic snippet state, persisted VIN offline sample state, minimal counterfactual actor state, geometry-rich counterfactual ablation state, and privileged oracle rollout state. The main Q_H actor input starts from the minimal counterfactual state; all-candidate GT renders, GT mesh crops, and oracle RRI labels remain outside the actor-visible state.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-historic-snippet-state">historic state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-persisted-offline-state">offline state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-minimal-counterfactual-state">CF0 state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-geometry-rich-counterfactual-state">CF+ state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rollout-state">oracle state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-candidate-action-set">action set</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-validity-mask">mask</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-observed-target-selection">OBS-SEL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-predicted-target-q">PRED-Q</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rl_planning.html#state-and-action-space-contract" title="docs/contents/theory/rl_planning.qmd#state-and-action-space-contract">Finite-Candidate Rollout And Q_H Contract</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-historic-snippet-state">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Historic Snippet State</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">historic state</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.state</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>raw historic state</code> <code>logged snippet state</code> <code>historic observed state</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{hist}}=(I_{1:t},T_{1:t},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{semi}},V^{\mathrm{root}},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_hist</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Raw actor-visible state from the logged ASE/Project Aria snippet trajectory.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The historic snippet state is the richest non-privileged state because it comes from the original logged trajectory. It may contain calibrated camera streams, timestamps, trajectory and gravity estimates, semidense points with support fields, frozen EVL/EFM evidence, and observed or predicted OBBs. It must not contain the GT mesh or GT OBB crops as actor inputs.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-persisted-offline-state">offline state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oriented-bounding-box">OBB</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rl_planning.html#state-and-action-space-contract" title="docs/contents/theory/rl_planning.qmd#state-and-action-space-contract">Finite-Candidate Rollout And Q_H Contract</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/project_aria.html" title="docs/contents/literature/project_aria.qmd">Project Aria</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/efm3d.html" title="docs/contents/literature/efm3d.qmd">EFM3D and EVL</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-projectaria-engel2023">&#64;projectaria-engel2023</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-persisted-offline-state">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Persisted Offline Sample State</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">offline state</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.state</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>offline sample state</code> <code>VIN offline state</code> <code>persisted VIN state</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{off}}=(\mathrm{VinSnippetView},\mathcal{Q}_t,N_t,m_{t,i},\ell_{t,i})$</span><code>rl.s_off</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Compact persisted state used by VIN training and offline diagnostics.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The persisted offline sample state is not the full raw snippet. It is the compact immutable training and diagnostic payload: VinSnippetView, candidate poses/cameras/counts, labels and oracle metrics, optional candidate depths, compact OBB fields, trajectory metadata, and selected EVL numeric tensors needed to reproduce scoring diagnostics.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-historic-snippet-state">historic state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-vin-nbv">vin-nbv</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rl_planning.html#state-and-action-space-contract" title="docs/contents/theory/rl_planning.qmd#state-and-action-space-contract">Finite-Candidate Rollout And Q_H Contract</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.qmd">VinModelV3</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-minimal-counterfactual-state">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Minimal Counterfactual Actor State</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">CF0 state</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.state</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>minimal counterfactual state</code> <code>counterfactual actor state</code> <code>CF0 rollout state</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}}=(V^{\mathrm{root}},\mathcal{P}_t,\mathcal{Q}_t,m_{t,i},\rho_{t,i},e_t,b_t)$</span><code>rl.s_cf0</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Main Q_H actor state for mesh-supervised counterfactual rollouts.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The minimal counterfactual actor state is the default input to target-conditioned Q_H. It contains frozen root EVL context, the accumulated counterfactual point proxy, selected-action history, observed or predicted target descriptor, budget state, finite candidate table, validity masks, reason codes, and current-state candidate-query features. Synthetic observations update the state only after their candidate is selected.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-geometry-rich-counterfactual-state">CF+ state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-candidate-action-set">action set</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-counterfactual-transition">transition</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-finite-horizon-q-function">Q_H</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rl_planning.html#state-and-action-space-contract" title="docs/contents/theory/rl_planning.qmd#state-and-action-space-contract">Finite-Candidate Rollout And Q_H Contract</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-planning" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-planning">Master Thesis Research Questions</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card glossary-tier-core" id="term-geometry-rich-counterfactual-state">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Geometry-Rich Counterfactual State</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">CF+ state</span>
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-tier-badge glossary-tier-badge-core">core</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.state</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>geometry-rich counterfactual state</code> <code>counterfactual geometry state</code> <code>CF+ rollout state</code>
</div>

<div class="glossary-card-notation">
<div><strong>Symbols</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-symbols"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span></div></div>
<div><strong>Equations</strong><div class="glossary-notation-list glossary-notation-equations"><span class="glossary-notation-item"><span class="glossary-notation-math">$s_t^{\mathrm{cf+}}=(s_t^{\mathrm{cf0}},D_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},P_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}},N_{1:t}^{\mathrm{sel}})$</span><code>rl.s_cf_geom</code></span></div></div>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Counterfactual ablation state with selected synthetic geometry observations.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The geometry-rich counterfactual state adds only selected prior synthetic observations to the minimal state. It may include rendered depth, depth-valid masks, backprojected points, derived normals, and local support summaries for views that have already been selected. It does not include oracle renders for unselected candidates.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-minimal-counterfactual-state">CF0 state</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-counterfactual-transition">transition</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rollout-state">oracle state</a></div></div>
